---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch

I'm always open to connecting with fellow professionals, discussing data science, or exploring collaboration opportunities.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Contact Information

{{< fa envelope >}} [alinabolshakovaa@gmail.com](mailto:alinabolshakovaa@gmail.com)

{{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alina-bolshakova/){target=_blank}

{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/AyaBlck){target=_blank}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Location

{{< fa location-dot >}} Dublin, Ireland

:::
::::

---

## References

Available upon request. Please feel free to reach out via email or LinkedIn.
